prompt: 给 extractor/token_tracker.py 的 TokenTracker 类里每个方法写可运行样例

assertions.text: Every method in TokenTracker has a corresponding .py file (7 methods: __init__, add, _aggregate, get_summary, print_summary, save_report, merge)
Every generated .py file runs successfully with `python <file>` (exit code 0)
Each file properly instantiates the TokenTracker class with realistic data before calling the method
Sample data uses realistic API response objects (with usage.prompt_tokens etc.) rather than trivial placeholders
